channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NASA reveals more on its moon base plans — and it seems the astronauts might have to assemble it all themselves, like a load of IKEA furniture
item.description: NASA outlines Moon Base missions, rover contracts, and cargo landers while relying on commercial partners and uncertain lunar economic potential

item.title: Quote of the day by Steve Jobs: "Everybody in this country should learn how to program a computer, because it teaches you how to think" — advice on upskilling for the future
item.description: Steve Jobs was a huge believer in the power of education and learning skills like programming and development

item.title: Nvidia, Microsoft, and Arm are all teasing Nvidia’s new N1X laptop processors
item.description: It's the world's worst kept secret that Nvidia is about to announce its own Arm-powered laptop chips at Computex this weekend, and now Microsoft, Nvidia, and Arm are all openly teasing the announcement. The Windows and Nvidia GeForce accounts on X both posted "A new era of PC" earlier today, and now Arm has followed […]

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, May 30 (game #1587)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, May 30 (game #1084)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, May 30 (game #818)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: AMD's rival to Nvidia's GB10 AI workstation is set to go on preorder in days, but is it too little too late?
item.description: The AMD Ryzen AI Halo will be available for preorder in June 2026, as the California-based chipmaker aims to compete with Nvidia's DGX by focusing on price and performance.

item.title: 24 Best Father’s Day Gifts for Dads (2026)
item.description: Dads are traditionally tough to shop for—let me help with these handpicked gift ideas for fathers with great taste.

item.title: The AI agent bottleneck isn't model performance — it's permissions
item.description: Enterprise AI agents are stalling — not because of model performance, but because of permissioning. Every agentic workflow eventually hits the same wall: what is this agent allowed to touch, on whose behalf, and how does the system know?Workday's answer is to make its existing system of record the governance layer for agents. Gerrit Kazmaier, the company's president for product and technology, told VentureBeat in an interview that customers often struggle when they cobble together solutions for their agents. “Sana makes sure the integrity of the approvals and security model is always adhered t...

item.title: SpaceX awarded $6.45B in Space Force contracts ahead of IPO
item.description: SpaceX already generated one-fifth of its 2025 revenue from government contracts, the company revealed in its IPO filing.

item.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
item.description: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.

item.title: What fly fishing taught me about building a brand
item.description: Learn how to read the water. There is a moment on a trout river, when the light softens, the water goes still and everything you know about casting, currents, and choosing the right fly comes together in a single act of skill. When the line unrolls, the fly touches down, and a trout rises to meet it, the feeling is close to gratitude. You did the work. The river did the rest....

item.title: Beats Solo 4 are $88 open box — and the 50-hour battery is no joke
item.description: Elevate your commutes and workouts with the Beats Solo 4 On-Ear Headphones.

item.title: 3 AdultFriendFinder security improvements made after the 2016 data breach
item.description: FriendFinder Networks took this breach seriously, and dramatically stepped up their security practices. Here are three major changes they made.

item.title: Design for the ADHD brain
item.description: This is the secret hack all marketers need to know. Researchers suggest that the average attention span has plummeted over the past two decades, from about 2.5 minutes to just 47 seconds in 2012. How can marketers capture attention when they’re losing people in less time than it takes to properly wash your hands?It turns out that there’s an overlooked community that can teach us a lot about what it takes to cut through in our distracted world....

item.title: SpaceX gets $4 billion contract to build missile-tracking ‘Golden Dome’ satellites
item.description: The Pentagon awarded SpaceX a $4.16 billion contract to build missile-tracking satellites linked with President Donald Trump's planned "Golden Dome" defense system, as reported earlier by Bloomberg. In an announcement on Friday, the US Space Force says the sensor-equipped satellites will allow it to detect and track targets from space. The Elon Musk-owned SpaceX - […]...

item.title: Could Microsoft kill the web browser at Build? Everything developers need to know about the NLWeb Protocol
item.description: NLWeb is Microsoft's open protocol for turning any website into a conversational AI app. Here's what developers need to know before Build 2026

item.title: The Postal Service just proposed sweeping new rules for mail-in voting
item.description: The USPS proposal follows Trump’s executive order tightening mail voting rules and could dramatically expand federal involvement in ballot tracking. President Trump’s attack on mail-in voting is roping in the U.S. Postal Service.
